Happy Birthday

Shahla

July First

↓

Every photo I have of you has the same thing in it — that smile that shows up before you even mean it to. I don’t think you know how much it does to a room, or to a day, or to whoever’s lucky enough to be sitting across from you.

So today isn’t really about the cake or the plans. It’s just about pointing at you for a minute and saying it out loud: I’m really glad you exist.

With all my love,Fawas

a few of my favorite moments

Here’s to you

Here’s to another year of your laugh being the best part of my day.

Made with love, just for you 🤍
